entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 15:4
entries.excerpt: The soothing tongue is a tree of life, etc. The tongue of the Catholic teacher leads to the fruit of eternal life; but the one who ignores the measure of ecclesiastical rule, destroys both his own spirit and that of his hearers by speaking ill.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE PROVERBS OF SOLOMON, FRAGMENT 15:4 on proverbs 15:4
entries.excerpt: "Sanity of tongue is the tree of life." The tongue which does not sin by speaking makes use of sanity: indeed the illness of the tongue is its sin. The one who can check his tongue and does not sin with it is filled with the Holy Spirit.
